purpose: Blinded multi-symbol annotation roster over the anchored nodes of drift-anchors.json — for every currently anchored node, the 1–3 named top-level units (same base file) that the node’s spec body semantically requires, each with a concise reason. ANNOTATION ONLY, pending evaluation: no policy scores against this roster yet, and nothing at runtime reads it. Protocol (blinded): annotators used ONLY each node’s current spec body, its code path, the AST unit inventory from the product extractor, and the single-anchor seed roster — never drift-truth.json, the human audit queues, judge votes, recall/miss analyses, baselines, or report result sections. Selector 0 is always the seed anchor; an extra selector was added ONLY where a distinct load-bearing body promise maps one-to-one onto that named unit, never to improve recall. Validate with: npx tsx spec-eval/bench/multi-anchors-check.ts (dead/ambiguous/typeOnly selectors, base-path/uniqueness/scope-mixing violations, and non-deterministic serialization all fail loud).

selectors.reason: The Judgment: per window commit, unified-0 hunks intersect the unit's range extracted as of that commit; any unacked intersection is anchor-drift.
Body: 'Verdicts about the anchor itself are loud, never silent' — dead and ambiguous are exactly this resolution's verdicts.
The staged-index surgery — block-strip in place from the staged blob, husk eviction, never delete tracked — is the body's central mechanism.
The resident-cache contract — always-instant view, TTL-backed background reconcile, silent swallow on no-forge.
Body names it: a store-routed reply 'forces one refresh past the TTL and AWAITS it (refreshForgeNow)'.
The entry the body narrates: boots the shared data layer, owns the fail-loud boot and stale-chunk recovery, picks the face by viewport width.
Enumerates exactly the surfaces the spec declares dead and applies the prose exemptions — the scan-scope contract.
Body: 'The scanner distrusts itself: every run starts with a self-check' planting words and refusing a clean report (exit 2).
Body: 'A real tokenizer (comment/string/template/regex-aware) does the extraction' so a word in a comment can't false-positive.
The per-layer diagnosis report (preconditions/contract/hooks/trust/git-hooks/backend/settings) that is the body's core promise.
The body's second headline axis — DOUBLE-delivery caught by identity stamp across three channels per harness — is this check.
The pure ancestry lookup the body promises: a commit is drift iff not reachable from the version, netted against the ack cover.
Body's acknowledgement floor: 'a Spec-OK ack quiets exactly the commits reachable from the ack commit, never a sibling branch's changes'.
Body normatively pins the hash definition: 'scenarios.ts scenarioHash, the one definition both filing seams and freshness read'.
Body's distinct promise: a strict validator rejects a malformed eval.md LOUD — at scan and the pre-commit gate, never silently reshaped.
Body's resolution promise: a node ref resolves LOUD — exact canonical id wins, a shared leaf errors listing candidates.
The read engine's contract — readings joined with expected, freshness, and codeDrift into the newest-first timeline.
Body's evidence promise: /api/evidence serves each entry by content hash from the shared cache with a per-entry miss-original-file signal.
The feed component owning the kind filter, mustShow widen, sticky head, and visible-row reporting the body promises.
The #/evals top-level page owning the split, fold, selection, canonical-address deep-link, and board data path.
Body names it: 'That shell is ONE exported component (EvalMasterDetail), and it is deliberately SHARED' with the session eval tab.
Body: ONE EventDetail component, store-agnostic, reused in every home — the workspace pane itself.
Body's step-timeline promise: a step ruler naming each step at its position, labels keyed by the map's axis.
Body's remark-track promise: the (node,scenario) thread rail with the docked composer writing through CLI-parity /api/remarks.
The symmetric twin verb: hash in, bytes out — local cache first, backend fallback, fail loud naming both paths.
The bare transport half — put the bytes, print the 64-hex content hash, file nothing.
The upload sink's core promise — collision-proof safe name in the shared /tmp dir, absolute path returned for splicing.
Body: a crafted filename can't escape the upload dir — the name is reduced to a bare, sanitised basename first.
The panel component the body describes end-to-end: head, scenarios join, issues list, lite-corpus prose fill.
Body's per-scenario row promise: state mark, clamped expected preview, tracked files — the row a button emitting eval(node, scenario).
The core promise — return-on-close to ticket else declared sink, never body, deferred one frame.
The one shared button the three homes render — the affordance with the fold/unfold title/aria contract.
Body explicitly: 'FoldToggle.jsx exports the icon (FoldToggleIcon)' — the sidebar-toggle glyph promise.
Body: this node owns that deterministic core — state/delta/view and the reconcile-is-truth invariant are the ForgeCache class.
Body: 'resolveForgeHost() reads it from the repo itself' — the config → origin hostname → default resolution ladder with brief memoization.
Body names it: 'The registry (FORGE_DRIVERS / forgeDriverFor) stays the single meeting point' carrying the driverless-host degrade.
The port's second driver behind the same driver shape, selected by host id — the driver object is the contract's face.
Body's Where promise: the origin remote parsed into base URL + project path; https and ssh forms collapse to the same pair.
Body's Who promise: a token env var first, else git's own credential store read-only with prompting disabled; no token → fail loud.
Body: 'getBoard() is the one seam every graph read goes through' holding single-flight, scoped splice/rebuild, cache-until-change, and the watchdog.
Body names 'invalidateBoard(scope)': the dirty bit carries a domain — sessions/full, escalating, never downgrading.
Body: 'getBoardJson() runs JSON.stringify once per build' — the serialization is cached too.
The assembly where the lean cuts (dropped body/parts, latest-per-scenario evals, slim scenarios) are applied to the wire payload.
Body's evals cut — 'the graph carries only the latest reading per scenario' — and it names latestPerScenario as 'a filter, never a projection'.
Body's third cut: 'Each declared scenario rides the graph slim — {name, tags}' maps one-to-one onto this unit.
The strip component owning the three clusters, chip walks, and ScoreBadge reuse the body narrates.
Body: 'spex materialize is a pure function of the spec tree's surface nodes' obeying the forgetting law over a closed set of landing points.
Body names it: 'dematerialize = materialize(∅)' — the empty policy spex-uninstall builds on.
Body: this node owns 'the vocabulary + validation (resolveHarnessTargets)' with the two fail-loud invariants.
Body: node also owns 'the select-vs-prune split (partitionHarnesses)', handing resolved plugin folders to its plugins result.
Body: 'A compiler flattens them into a flat manifest (event · order · block · script), written PERSISTENTLY into the materialized tree's OWN slot'.
The one behavior-bearing filing seam: latest-reading anchoring, refusal on unmeasured, idempotent duplicate, append-only sidecar.
Body: 'the invariant is guaranteed at the MINT' — the exported mint every resolve site relies on, pinned to NFC.
Body names reId as the collision-suffix joiner corrected at the mint: the suffix joins its path segments with _, never /.
The top-level #/issues master-detail page the body narrates: list column, filter bars, chips, selection-is-detail.
Body's distinct promise: the full-height DETAIL of the one selection — concern-alone title, meta strip, docked composer.
Body: 'New opens as a centered pop-out — concern + optional body, a compact store picker' maps one-to-one onto this unit.
The body's one declarative table — every board binding as {id, keys, rebind, desc} records the handler and help legend project from.
The inversion contract: three link ways into per-node {issues, prs} lists with marker-wins de-dup and only-linked-nodes.
Body's branch clause: resolved by longest-match against the known ids, never by guessing where the -<sha> suffix begins.
Body's marker clause: an issue body line 'Spec: <id>[, <id>]' (case-insensitive); a typo'd marker links nothing.
Body says outright 'this node owns that shared helper' — the ONE aliveness judgment both surfaces share.
The body's core claim — '@ just auto-sends a prompt', @new spawn with the originator-parent rule, the drain guard — is the dispatch.
Body: one script-agnostic grammar 'in the parser, the autocomplete's trigger scan, and the server's node derivation alike' — the parse is this unit.
Body names it: 'One shared stripRefSigil (in this module, beside the parser) sheds a leading @ or a full [[…]] wrapper', tolerance never widening matching.
The conflict-marker scan over the three source trees that drives the one-line message + exit 75 degradation the body promises.
The one-shot migrator the body narrates end-to-end: preconditions, the three rewrite tiers, staged output, post-checks through the real new CLI.
The phone face's shell — the viewport switch, the two planes, the lazy-chunk entry the body promises.
Body's headline promise: the terminal-free conversation — header, day-separated timeline, docked composer with silent replyVia note.
Body's Create bullet: full-screen composer, busy-gated awaited create, reusing the ONE shared launch path.
Body names it: 'resolveEvalPending narrows each resolved node's issues to the open and flagged ones' — the node's single output.
Body's flag predicate: marked needs-eval by a label or a body line that is the bare marker; a trailing-content line is not a flag.
The two-row tile — status dot, title, op glyphs, recency, badges, collapsed tab — the body narrates.
Body's row-2 promise: live editors as one avatar each, deduped per session, capped with +N.
Body's dedicated promise: React Flow handles are edge anchors only — never visible, never interactive.
The file's single unit is the custom right-click node menu the body describes end to end.
The gate the body promises: key on the missing primitive (tmux), print ONE actionable line, exit before any cryptic downstream failure.
Body: this node is the missing EMITTER materializing the whole system into one self-contained bundle under <folder>/plugins/spexcode/.
Body: the clean is 'the bundle's surgical inverse, identity-gated on the bundle's own plugin.json name' — removes only a spexcode bundle.
Body: 'resolveLayout() answers — where is main, which branch is its source of truth, how to enumerate the other checkouts'.
Body: the source-of-truth branch 'is detected by mainBranch(), never the baked-in name main' — override, current branch, else main.
Body: 'The config read is the ONE fail-loud seam here (readJsonConfig)' — a malformed file fails loud, never a silent revert.
The gateway the body narrates — TLS termination, the opt-in login gate, static dist, /api and WebSocket proxying.
Body: 'The certificate is a resolved value, never hardcoded' with the flags > env > spexcode.json > self-signed precedence.
Body: 'The same gateway powers local serve' — spex dashboard ungated on loopback, --host widens, gate note keys on the loopback boundary.
The whole reconnect state machine — backoff, stable-vs-flapping reset, intentional-close suppression, health states — is this one factory.
The one computation fed at the call sites: the pure function that takes the remark track explicitly and fires the remark axis every surface reads.
The third seeding transport the body assigns this file: the machine snapshot is COPIED, a snapshot on purpose.
Body: 'What seeding makes git-visible it hides in the shared .git/info/exclude — idempotent, self-healing, no force-add bait.'
One mechanism for every resizable pane — the single hook (drag, clamp, persist) future panes mount.
The verb itself — selector resolve, one detach hint, foreground tmux attach blocking until detach, TTY/offline guards.
Body's deliberate LOCAL exception: 'the verb asserts locality FIRST' — a remote SPEXCODE_API_URL fails loud naming the remote-capable alternatives.
The routed two-pane console page the body describes — list, tabs, terminal, docked input, type mode.
Body's IME promise: an Enter that commits a composition is never read as dispatch — the guard covering send, launch, and menus.
Body's type-mode promise: every keystroke — ⌃/⌥/⌘ combos included — forwards raw to the pane as key tokens.
Body: the bulk-close bar and its confirm are this node's own surface, the file's single unit.
The cursor-anchored right-click pop-over carrying rename/close/reset-order — the spec's whole gesture surface.
Body: 'buildBoard (graph.ts) assembles the dashboard's runtime state' — tree, overlay, session list, project identity — served at /api/graph.
The routed settings page hosting the language, shortcuts, and theme sections the body promises.
Body's named second section: 'Shortcuts — the editable twin of the help legend', a rebindable table.
Body: 'all behind one entrypoint rankDocs(query, docs)' — the shared scoring contract both callers funnel through.
Body's CJK promise assigned to tokenize: ASCII runs as one token, each CJK character a unigram.
Body names tierWeight for the name > desc > body tiers with the recalibrated desc weight.
The slim always-visible icon rail page switch the body specifies.
Body's rail contract: one rail, the page list and order (Evals above Issues — evals lead) map one-to-one onto this table.
The loader/aggregator deriving a node's whole observable state (version, drift, session, status) from git at read time — derive, not store.
The whole rule registry the body enumerates — every error and warn tier the contract promises fires from this one function.
Body: 'loadConfig reads it through the shared fail-loud readJsonConfig' — the project-shaped lint budgets from spexcode.json.
The retriever carrying the locked output contract; the other units are its helpers.
Body names nearestTitles for the zero-result route: per-word normalised Levenshtein over title+id, top 3.
The whole bootstrap the body narrates: git precondition, template copies, hooks, starter spexcode.json, harness validation, truthful success message.
The indented, status-coloured terminal tree with badges and the base-state labelling law with NO_COLOR degradation.
Body's distinct '--json keeps the machine exit' promise — the filtered subtree as nested objects with badge counts precomputed.
The identity-stamped total backout the body describes — dematerialize(∅) plus the store.
Body's distinct removal bullet: 'any spexcode plugin bundle' — identity-gated, also cleans a hand-dropped bundle the emit ledger never knew.
Body: hooks preserved by default; with --hooks a hook is removed ONLY when its content carries a SpexCode identity marker.
Body: 'One singleton TooltipLayer is the whole system' — every promised behavior lives in it.
The existence-vs-details guard the body centers on: branch on the directory, omit only genuine removal, degraded row on transient failure.
Body's last-resort guard promise: a process-level net logs uncaught exceptions/rejections and keeps serving.
